shipping-policy.text: Zone 1 (Cairo & Giza) = 50 EGP Zone 2 (Alexandria) = 60 EGP Zones 3 (Mansoura & Kafr elsheikh) =80 EGP At DNM, your satisfaction is our priority. In case you're not completely happy with your purchase, we've got you covered. your item within 1 day of receipt, provided it remains . To initiate an exchange, simply DM us your order number and reason for exchange. Please note that exchange requests cannot be processed for items that have been opened, used, or damaged in any way. We require all items for exchange to be returned in their original packaging and condition. DNM reserves the right to refuse exchanges if the product returned does not meet our exchange policy requirements. Choosing a selection results in a full page refresh. Opens in a new window.

refund-policy.text: At DNM, we strive to provide you with the best possible shopping experience. Due to the limited stock nature of our products, please review our refund and exchange policy carefully: : We understand that sometimes exchanges may be necessary. Therefore, we offer exchanges for items purchased from our limited stock collection. You can exchange your item for a different size or color, subject to availability. : In the unlikely event of a factory mishap, such as a manufacturing defect or error, we will gladly offer a refund or exchange. Please contact our customer support of receiving your order to initiate the return process. : To be eligible for an exchange or refund due to a factory mishap, the item must be in its original condition, unworn, and with all original tags and packaging intact. : Refunds are not available for items from our limited stock collection unless there is a factory mishap as mentioned above. We recommend carefully reviewing the size charts and product descriptions before making a purchase. : To initiate an exchange, please contact our customer support of receiving your order. Our team will guide you through the exchange process and provide you with further instructions. : Please note that the customer is responsible for any shipping costs incurred during the exchange process, except in cases of a factory mishap where we will cover the return shipping expenses. We are committed to resolving any issues promptly and ensuring your satisfaction. If you have any questions or concerns regarding our refund and exchange policy, please reach out to our customer support team. Thank you for your understanding and support.
